name: Pythia-6.9B
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer (GPT-NeoX architecture, RoPE, parallel attention+FF, 32 layers)
note: Mid-large Pythia size widely used as a reproducible base for training-dynamics and scaling-law studies

results.notes: Zero-shot LAMBADA (OpenAI) accuracy for the fully-trained, non-deduplicated pythia-6.9b, Table 7 (Appendix G.1) of the Pythia paper: 0.673±0.007.
Zero-shot PIQA accuracy for the fully-trained, non-deduplicated pythia-6.9b, Table 7: 0.752±0.010.
Zero-shot WinoGrande accuracy for the fully-trained, non-deduplicated pythia-6.9b, Table 7: 0.609±0.014.
Zero-shot ARC-Easy accuracy for the fully-trained, non-deduplicated pythia-6.9b, Table 7: 0.673±0.010.
Zero-shot ARC-Challenge accuracy for the fully-trained, non-deduplicated pythia-6.9b, Table 7: 0.313±0.014.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: fetched huggingface.co/EleutherAI/pythia-6.9b - exact param count 6,857,302,016 (=6.857B, rounds to 6.9 matching record), 32 layers, Apache-2.0 license confirmed. 2048 sequence length confirmed. Paper date 2023-04-03 confirmed on arxiv. No results rows to verify (none were provided).
